channel.title: Charoen Watthana Initiative
channel.description: Recent content on Charoen Watthana Initiative

item.title: About Us
item.description:
Our Mission

The Charoen Watthana Initiative, aspiring to evolve into a formally recognized foundation, is driven by the following goals:

🏥 Mu Ko Samui Center

A 24/7 community care hub for all nationalities focused on mental and general healthcare. We utilize AI-assisted support verified by human professionals to ensure care quality and accessibility.

🌱 Youth Values Education

We nurture moral values, resilience, and compassion among youth — starting on Samui Island and expanding throughout Southern Thailand.

item.title: Founder's Mission Statement
item.description:
🕊️ Founder’s Mission Statement

By Wesley (a.k.a. ฉลาม – Chalaam)

My name is Wesley. For the past ten years, I’ve called Thailand my home — not because I was born here, but because I chose to live in service of the people here.

Originally from the Netherlands, I was raised with a deep belief that helping others is one of the most meaningful things we can do. That belief led me to volunteer on ambulances with local rescue teams across Thailand. I worked without pay, driven only by purpose and compassion.

item.title: Get Involved
item.description:
We welcome donors, volunteers, and community champions to join our mission.

🤲 Donate

Every contribution helps us build the Helping Hands Center and support those in need.

🧑‍🤝‍🧑 Volunteer

Lend your time, skills, or network to help us grow. At this time we are busy with setting up the legal framework so it isn’t applicable until the Initiative has became an official Thai not-for profit foundation.

📣 Spread the Word

Share our mission with your community and help us reach those who need us most.
